sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53533" key="karukopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰρῡκο-ποιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n53533.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maker of a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καρύκη</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0309.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Achae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
